acceptanceCriteria.AC1: PASS - /backend and /frontend exist; shared tsconfig.base.json present
acceptanceCriteria.AC2: PASS - server starts on port 3000; GET /api/health returns 200 JSON
acceptanceCriteria.AC3: PASS - POST /api/forms/upload accepts multipart/form-data with file field
acceptanceCriteria.AC4: PASS - upload route generates uuid formId and ISO createdAt and stores in in-memory Map
acceptanceCriteria.AC5: PASS - extraction runs in upload handler immediately after store create
acceptanceCriteria.AC6: PASS - schema includes formId/title/version/status draft/fields with id,label,type,required,order
acceptanceCriteria.AC7: PASS - extraction type inference and tests cover text, textarea, date, number, radio, checkbox, select
acceptanceCriteria.AC8: PASS - successful upload returns { formId, status: extraction-complete, draftSchemaId }
acceptanceCriteria.AC9: PASS - non-PDF upload returns 400 with structured error body
acceptanceCriteria.AC10: FAIL - GET /api/forms does not include title; returns metadata like originalFileName/mimeType/fileSize instead
acceptanceCriteria.AC11: FAIL - GET /api/forms/:formId returns form record only; does not embed current draft schema
acceptanceCriteria.AC12: PASS - errors consistently include error.code and error.message across tested routes
acceptanceCriteria.AC13: PASS - tests cover file validation, extraction logic, and schema shape (69 passing tests)
acceptanceCriteria.AC15: PASS - backend README documents install, run, test, and curl usage

bugs.title: GET /api/forms response contract mismatch
bugs.steps: Call GET /api/forms after at least one upload
bugs.expected: Each list item includes formId, title, status, createdAt
bugs.actual: Response items omit title and include extra storage metadata (originalFileName, mimeType, fileSizeBytes)
bugs.evidence: curl GET /api/forms returned forms without title

bugs.title: GET /api/forms/:formId does not include draft schema
bugs.steps: Upload valid PDF then call GET /api/forms/:formId
bugs.expected: Form response includes current draft schema
bugs.actual: Endpoint returns form record fields only; schema is only available on /api/forms/:formId/schema

bugs.title: Uploading one provided fixture can crash backend process
bugs.expected: Request handled safely with 201 or structured 4xx/5xx without process crash
bugs.actual: UnhandledPromiseRejection FormatError: bad XRef entry observed in server process
bugs.evidence: terminal output from backend dev server

issues: 6 high severity npm audit vulnerabilities reported in backend dependencies
Extraction success is inconsistent across included fixture PDFs

evidence.typescript: npm install && npx tsc --noEmit completed with zero compiler errors
evidence.uploadSuccess: curl upload of housing-benefit-application.pdf and universal-credit-change.pdf returned 201 in test run
evidence.uploadError: curl upload of non-PDF returned 400 INVALID_FILE_TYPE
evidence.owasp: Server-side MIME+extension+magic-byte validation and filename sanitisation implemented

recommendations: Align GET /api/forms payload with contract: include title and only contract fields
Update GET /api/forms/:formId to include draft schema or adjust contract plus endpoint behavior consistently
Handle pdf-parse failures without unhandled promise rejection; add regression test for corrupted/bad-xref fixtures
Add runtime integration test using real fixture PDFs (not only mocked pdf-parse) to catch extraction reliability issues
Address high severity dependency vulnerabilities before next sprint hardening
